feature: Live Social Media API Integrations - Replace simulated/mocked analytics data with real API calls
summary: Tested new Live API Integration feature for Social Media Dashboard. All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI elements verified including info banner, live/simulated count badges, DataSource badges (SIM/LIVE), legend, and API badges on platform cards.

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/social/live-supported returns 14 platforms with live adapters
GET /api/social/live-supported includes all 14 expected platform IDs
GET /api/social/live-supported is public (no auth required)
GET /api/social/connections includes has_live_api field on each connection
GET /api/social/connections includes has_real_credentials field on each connection
Live platforms have has_live_api: true (twitter, youtube, instagram, etc)
Non-live platforms have has_live_api: false
GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard includes live_count field
GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard includes simulated_count field
Dashboard live_count + simulated_count = connected_count
Dashboard platforms array includes data_source field (live or simulated)
GET /api/social/metrics/platforms has live_count at top level
GET /api/social/metrics/platforms has simulated_count at top level
Each platform has data_source field (live or simulated)
Each platform has has_live_api boolean field
Categories have live_count field
POST /api/social/metrics/refresh returns live_count
POST /api/social/metrics/refresh returns simulated_count
Refresh live_count + simulated_count = refreshed_count
All platforms show simulated when no real credentials
has_real_credentials: false for empty credential platforms

frontend_tests.test: Analytics tab shows 'Live API Integration Active' info banner
Analytics tab shows simulated count badge ('120 Simulated')
Platform performance rows show SIM badge next to platform name
Legend at bottom: 'LIVE = Real API data' and 'SIM = Simulated estimates'
Platform cards with live API show 'API' badge
Aggregate metrics display correctly (8.2M followers, 67.3M likes, etc)

live_supported_endpoint.description: Returns list of 14 platforms with live API adapters

connections_new_fields.description: Each connection now includes has_live_api (boolean) and has_real_credentials (boolean)

dashboard_metrics_live_fields.description: Top-level counts plus data_source on each platform

platform_metrics_live_fields.description: Top-level counts, per-platform data_source and has_live_api, category live_count

refresh_metrics_live_fields.description: Returns counts of live vs simulated refreshes

frontend_ui_elements.info_banner: 'Live API Integration Active' banner with explanation
frontend_ui_elements.count_badges: Shows live/simulated count badges next to 'Metrics for X platforms'
frontend_ui_elements.data_source_badges: SIM or LIVE badge on each platform row in performance table
frontend_ui_elements.legend: Footer legend explaining LIVE = Real API data, SIM = Simulated estimates
frontend_ui_elements.api_badges: 'API' badge on platform cards that have live API support

critical_code_review_comments: 14 platform adapters properly implemented (twitter, youtube, instagram, facebook, spotify, tiktok, linkedin, twitch, soundcloud, reddit, youtube_music, threads, spotify_podcasts, whatsapp_business)
Graceful fallback to simulated data when credentials are empty/invalid
data_source field properly propagated through all metrics endpoints
Frontend correctly displays SIM/LIVE badges with proper styling
Legend clearly explains data source indicators
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None - all 120 platforms pre-connected via bulk-connect with empty credentials. All show as 'simulated' data source.

mocked_api.description: Live API adapters attempt real API calls but fall back to simulated data when credentials are empty/invalid. Current state: 0 live, 120 simulated because all platforms were bulk-connected with empty credentials.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Social Media API Integration feature complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/social/live-supported (14 platforms with live adapters), connections have has_live_api and has_real_credentials fields, metrics endpoints have live_count/simulated_count and data_source. All 120 platforms currently show 'simulated' because they were bulk-connected with empty credentials. Adding real credentials to a supported platform (twitter, youtube, etc) would make it show 'live' data. Frontend Analytics tab shows info banner, count badges, SIM/LIVE badges on rows, and legend. Platform cards show 'API' badge for platforms with live API support.
